name: Phantasma
description: Irradiate enemies with a continuous stream of deadly plasma. Charging secondary fire releases a glob of plasma that erupts with homing bomblets on impact. Increased Magazine Capacity when wielded by Revenant.

components.name: Argon Crystal
components.description:
A Void based radioactive resource that decays every day it is out of the Void.

Location: Missions in the Void

components.name: Blueprint
components.description: Irradiate enemies with a continuous stream of deadly plasma. Charging secondary fire releases a glob of plasma that erupts with homing bomblets on impact. Increased Magazine Capacity when wielded by Revenant.

components.name: Intact Sentient Core
components.description:
An integral component of Sentient anatomy.  Rarely found undamaged, the specimen may prove useful.

Location: Drops from Vomvalysts on the Plains of Eidolon (Earth) at night, and from Sentients found on Lua and the Veil Proxima

components.name: Nano Spores
components.description:
Fibrous technocyte tumour. Handle Infested tissue with caution.

Location: Saturn, Neptune, Eris, and Deimos

components.name: Plastids
components.description:
A disgusting nanite-infested tissue mass.

Location: Phobos, Saturn, Uranus, Pluto, and Eris

patchlogs.name: Veilbreaker: Revenant Prime: Hotfix 32.0.10
patchlogs.fixes:
Phantasma Prime Blueprint 
Phantasma Prime Barrel 
Phantasma Prime Stock

patchlogs.name: Veilbreaker: Revenant Prime: Hotfix 32.0.9
patchlogs.changes:
Get instant access to the latest Prime Warframe with Revenant Prime Access. Add Revenant Prime along with his signature Prime Weapons Tatsu Prime and Phantasma Prime, and exclusive Prime Accessories along with Resource and Affinity Boosters to your Arsenal.
Phantasma Prime is burnished with deadly force. In Revenant’s hands, it has increased magazine capacity. The might of its irradiated plasma is reminiscent of the fearsome Eidolon.
Get Revenant Prime instantly with Prime Access, or earn Relics in-game to craft Revenant Prime, Tatsu Prime and Phantasma Prime. Find the Prime Access packs here: https://www.warframe.com/prime-access

patchlogs.name: The Deadlock Protocol: Hotfix 28.0.2
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed for Phantasma secondary fire explosion not making sound.

patchlogs.name: Operation: Scarlet Spear: TennoGen 27.3.8 + 27.3.8.1 + 27.3.8.2
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Kuva Tonkor and Phantasma requiring an Orokin Catalyst to unlock its Exilus Slot instead of an Exilus Adapter.

patchlogs.name: Fortuna: Hotfix 24.1.2 + 24.1.2.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Pax Seeker projectiles and Phantasma’s Alt Fire ignoring Nullifier bubbles.

patchlogs.name: Chimera: Update 23.10
patchlogs.changes:
Phantasma’s Alt Fire homing projectile amount is no longer based on charge time. Alt Fire now releases 5 total homing projectiles.
Phantasma’s Alt Fire damage per projectile now scales based on charge time.
patchlogs.fixes: Toned down the FX for Mirage’s Hall of Mirror clones when firing the Phantasma.

patchlogs.name: Mask of the Revenant: Update 23.8.0 + 23.8.0.1 + 23.8.0.2
patchlogs.changes: While active, the pillar creates homing projectiles similar to the Vomvalyst attacks and Revenant's Signature weapon, the Phantasma!
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed inability to equip Sinister Reach on the Phantasma.

patchlogs.name: Mask of the Revenant: Update 23.6.0
patchlogs.fixes: Phantasma alt-fire will now seek targets in all directions, instead of behind the projectile.
